dragHint: Drag a slot to request a time

dialog.title: Request a time
dialog.description: Propose a time that works for you. The owner decides whether to accept it.

success.title: Request sent
success.body: Thanks — your proposed time has been sent. It’s up to the calendar’s owner to accept or decline.

errors.endAfterStart: The end time must be after the start time.
errors.send: Couldn’t send your request. Please try again.
errors.network: Couldn’t send your request. Please check your connection.

inactive.title: This link is no longer active
inactive.body: The shared calendar you’re looking for has been turned off or has expired. Ask the person who shared it for a new link.
